dimensions.label: Faithfulness
dimensions.question: How faithful is each summary? A highly faithful summary is completely and strictly derived from the lecture video content.

dimensions.label: Completeness
dimensions.question: How completely does each summary capture the main concepts of the video chapter?

dimensions.label: Coherence
dimensions.question: How coherent and logically organized is each summary?

dimensions.label: Usefulness
dimensions.question: How useful is each summary as educational review material?

familiarity_question: How familiar are you with the topic covered in this video segment?

selection_quality.label: Selection Quality
selection_quality.question: Rate the overall quality of the above visual summary for this video chapter that is composed of selected visual objects.

include_important.label: Include Important
include_important.question: The above illustration also presents visual objects NOT selected for the visual summary. Identify any unselected visual objects which, in your opinion, are important for a visual summary. Select below:

exclude_unimportant.label: Exclude Unimportant
exclude_unimportant.question: Among the visual objects selected for the visual summary, identify any that, in your opinion, should not be part of the visual summary. Deselect below:
